title: BoatHider
description: Plugin to hide other entities in boats when a player is in a boat. This allows multiple people to go on a single boat course simultaniously without colliding, with no client-side mods neccesary.
body:
# BoatHider Boat hiding and boat collision prevention plugin. Currently functional on:
  • 1.19.4
  • 1.20
  • 1.20.1
  • 1.20.2
  • 1.20.3
  • 1.20.4
  • 1.20.5
  • 1.20.6
  • 1.21
PRs for bug fixes, version updates, and possible features are welcome. Open a github issue if you need this plugin for a particular mc version, too lazy to update unless its needed.
